description_long: This is a compact, modern hammer with a rectangular, blocky head and a straight, textured handle. The head is solid and angular, with a prominent, circular metallic striking face on one side, contrasting against the otherwise matte black body. The handle appears to be made of a durable, synthetic material and features a coiled or ribbed texture for enhanced grip, ending in a loop for hanging or securing the tool. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for heavy-duty urban or construction tasks. The hammer's proportions suggest it is designed for one-handed use, and the materials indicate a focus on durability and comfort. No visible branding or damage is present, and the finish is clean and unblemished.
description: A modern, blocky hammer with a black, textured handle and a metallic striking face, featuring a loop at the end for hanging. The design is robust and utilitarian, with no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: The hammer is shown with its rectangular head and metallic striking face clearly visible, along with the textured handle and looped end.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the solid, blocky head and the straight alignment of the handle, with the loop at the bottom more prominent.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the hammer head is visible, showing the same rectangular form and the handle's ribbed texture.
description_view_3: A top-down perspective reveals the circular metallic striking face on the head and the full length of the handle with its loop.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, synthetic handle with a ribbed, textured surface and a loop at the end for hanging or securing.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular, blocky hammer head with a flat, circular metallic striking face; no claw or peen features visible.
attribute_attachment_or_accessory: Loop at the end of the handle
